BUSINESS GLOSSARY - Enterprise System
Last Updated: 2024-03-15
Status: Partial (pending review)

==========================================
CUSTOMER MANAGEMENT
==========================================

Customer
An individual or organization that... [definition incomplete]

Client
A person or company that purchases goods or services. (Note: may be used interchangeably with Customer in some contexts)

Account Holder
The person designated as the primary owner of an account. Similar to Customer but with account-specific context.

End User
The actual user of a product or service, may differ from the purchaser.

==========================================
ORDER & TRANSACTION
==========================================

Order
A request to purchase products or services. Can be in various states.

Transaction
Similar to Order but more general. May refer to any exchange of value.

Purchase
The act of buying something. Related to Order and Transaction.

Sales Order
An order with confirmed pricing and inventory allocation. Distinct from Quote.

Quote
A preliminary order with estimated pricing, not yet confirmed.

==========================================
PRODUCT & INVENTORY
==========================================

Product
A thing that is... [definition needs clarification]

Item
Synonym for Product. Used in inventory context.

SKU
Stock Keeping Unit - a unique identifier for a product variant.

Inventory Item
Physical products held in stock. May be referenced as Product or Item.

Merchandise
Goods available for sale. Similar to Product.

==========================================
PAYMENT & BILLING
==========================================

Payment
The transfer of money to settle an order.

Invoice
A document requesting payment. Related to Bill.

Bill
A statement of money owed. Similar to Invoice.

Receipt
Proof of payment. Generated after Payment is processed.

==========================================
ACCOUNTING & FINANCE
==========================================

Revenue
Income from sales. The same as... [definition circular, see Sales]

Sales
Revenue from selling products. See Revenue.

Financial Transaction
Any monetary exchange. See Payment, Transaction.

==========================================
SHIPPING & LOGISTICS
==========================================

Shipment
The process of delivering goods to a customer.

Delivery
The completion of a Shipment when goods reach the customer.

Fulfillment
The process of preparing and delivering orders. Encompasses Shipment and Delivery.

==========================================
STATUS DEFINITIONS
==========================================

Order Status:
- Pending: Not yet processed
- Processing: Being handled
- Completed: Finished successfully
- Cancelled: Terminated before completion
- On Hold: Temporarily suspended
- Failed: [definition missing]

Payment Status:
- Pending: Awaiting processing
- Approved: Accepted
- Declined: Rejected
- Refunded: Money returned
- Partially Refunded: Some money returned

==========================================
RELATIONSHIPS (UNCLEAR)
==========================================

Customer to Order: A customer can place multiple orders. Or is it accounts that place orders?

Order to Payment: An order may have multiple payment attempts. Or is it one-to-one?

Product to Inventory: Products are tracked in inventory. But what's the exact relationship?

Invoice to Order: An invoice is generated for an order. But when? And can one order have multiple invoices?
